compiled_state.title: RED test: Gate 2d integration in fix-bug SKILL.md
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
Create tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2d.py with structural validation tests for Gate 2d in SKILL.md.

Tests:
1. test_gate_2d_section_exists — SKILL.md contains Gate 2d section
2. test_gate_2d_dispatches_script — references gate-2d-dependency-check.sh
3. test_gate_2d_existing_pattern_exemption — documents that existing patterns do not trigger
4. test_gate_2d_post_investigation — Gate 2d appears after investigation/fix proposal
5. test_gate_2d_primary_signal — references signal_type primary
6. test_gate_2d_failure_fallback — documents graceful degradation

Docstring: structural metadata validation — design contract verification.
Append to existing .test-index comma-separated entry for fix-bug/SKILL.md.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file exists
  Verify: test -f tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2d.py
- [ ] At least 6 test functions
  Verify: grep -c 'def test_' tests/skills/test_fix_bug_gate_2d.py | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] .test-index entry updated
  Verify: grep 'fix-bug/SKILL.md' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index | grep -q 'test_fix_bug_gate_2d'
